situational_context: Running comeback day 56, 13 runs completed. Run #13 executed today (3.5 km, suffer 13) — conservative after Run #12 overshoot (7.5 km, suffer 36 on Jun 21). ACWR dropped to 0.71 (below 0.8 lower bound) after forced heatwave inactivity (5-day gap Jun 23-27). HRV weekly avg 34 ms (UNBALANCED/LOW 7 of 7 days) but overnight HRV recovering to 37 and RHR at 47 bpm (best in 2 weeks) — consistent with residual heat stress dissipating, not overtraining. VO2max running improved to 41.1 (from 40.6). Weight reversed to 103.67 kg (+1 kg from 102.62 in early June). Heatwave ending: 27°C today dropping to 23°C tomorrow. Sur site Mon Jun 29 and Thu Jul 2. Priority: carefully ramp acute load back above 0.8 ACWR while respecting return-to-running tissue tolerance constraints at 103+ kg.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Sortie vélo weekend — 60-75 min gravel Z2

recommendations.text: ACWR 0.71 — below the 0.8 safe floor. Carefully ramp acute load: execute Run #14 (Wed Jul 1) and cycling session (Sat Jul 4) to bring ACWR back toward 0.8+. Do not overcorrect — tissue tolerance at 103 kg remains the bottleneck. Max single-session load 14-15.
recommendations.measurable: ACWR ≥ 0.8 by Jul 5; no session load > 15

recommendations.text: HRV weekly avg 34 ms with 7/7 UNBALANCED/LOW days. RHR improving (47 bpm, best in 2 weeks) and VO2max up (41.1) — consistent with heatwave-related autonomic stress, not overtraining (ACWR too LOW). Expect natural recovery as temperatures normalize to 23-26°C. If HRV weekly avg fails to return to ≥35 by Jul 5, reduce training volume.
recommendations.measurable: HRV weekly avg ≥ 35 ms by Jul 5

recommendations.text: Weight reversed to 103.67 kg (+1 kg in 2 weeks). Protein intake averaging 116g/day, well below 150g target. Prioritize protein (≥150g/day) and moderate total calories on rest days (<2500 kcal). Each kg lost ≈ 3 kg less peak impact force per stride.
recommendations.measurable: Protein ≥ 150g/day avg; weight trend back to ≤ 103 kg by mid-July

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if ACWR remains below 0.8 for more than 7 additional days
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 0.71 — detraining territory. Need gradual ramp-up without spiking above 1.3.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV weekly avg drops below 32 ms or fails to recover to ≥35 by Jul 5
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 34 ms, 7/7 days UNBALANCED/LOW. Expect recovery as heatwave ends.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized joint/tendon pain lasting >24h after Run #13 or #14 triggers skip of next run
markers_to_watch.reason: Tissue tolerance remains the bottleneck at 103+ kg body weight; pain signals early overload.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if weight > 104 kg on next Withings reading (Jul 5 pesée)
markers_to_watch.reason: Current trajectory reversing the prior downtrend. Heatwave fluid retention vs genuine regain needs tracking.
